name: validate_spl
description: Validate an SPL query for potential risks and inefficiencies

name: search_oneshot
description: Run a oneshot search query in Splunk and return results

max_count.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 100, or SPL_MAX_EVENTS_COUNT from .env, 0 = unlimited)

output_format.description: Format for results - json, markdown/md, csv, or summary (default: json)

risk_tolerance.description: Override risk tolerance level (default: SPL_RISK_TOLERANCE from .env)

name: search_export
description: Run an export search query in Splunk that streams results immediately

max_count.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 100, or SPL_MAX_EVENTS_COUNT from .env, 0 = unlimited)

output_format.description: Format for results - json, markdown/md, csv, or summary (default: json)

risk_tolerance.description: Override risk tolerance level (default: SPL_RISK_TOLERANCE from .env)

name: get_indexes
description: Get list of available Splunk indexes with detailed information

name: get_saved_searches
description: Get list of saved searches available in Splunk

name: run_saved_search
description: Run a saved search by name

search_name.description: Name of the saved search to run

trigger_actions.description: Whether to trigger the search's actions (default: false)
